pr_text:
## Title: Add NULL check in nas_timer_restart to prevent segmentation fault

### Summary
The NAS timer management module lacks a NULL pointer check in `nas_timer_restart()` after removing a timer entry from the queue. When `_nas_timer_db_remove_entry()` fails and returns NULL (due to race conditions or corrupted timer state), the code immediately dereferences the pointer to access `te->tv`, causing a segmentation fault. This crash scenario can occur when attempting to restart an active timer tha
